assessment_objectives.objective: the organization only uses Commercial Off-the-Shelf (COTS) security products.

for classified environments, only Government Off-The-Shelf (GOTS)or Commercial Off-The-Shelf (COTS) information assurance and information assurance-enabled information technology products that compose an NSA-approved solution are employed.
for classified environments, GOTS and COTS products have been evaluated and/or validated by NSA or in accordance with NSA-approved procedures.
